name: Pot of Benevolence
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>欲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>な<ruby lang="jp"><rb>壺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つぼ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 2 cards in the GY(s); shuffle them into the Deck(s). After activation, banish this card instead of sending it to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Pot of Benevolence" per turn.
eff: Target 2 cards in the GY(s); shuffle them into the Deck(s). After activation, banish this card instead of sending it to the GY. You can only activate 1 "Pot of Benevolence" per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
banished: Banishes cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
